entries.title: Arlington trihalomethanes trend upward heading into summer
entries.summary: Technician sampling along the Trinity River corridor shows TTHMs hovering around 2.4× our health guideline. Swapping catalytic carbon at year 4 keeps shower steam from smelling like a pool.

entries.title: Plano moms opt for whole-home + RO combo
entries.summary: Community Q&A revealed NTMWD chloramine taste during baby bottle prep. Families are pairing whole-home catalytic carbon with under-sink RO to keep PFAS and TTHMs out of the kitchen.

entries.title: Lead service line bypass keeps 75071 kitchen safe
entries.summary: We replaced a corroded service line feeding a 1990s home and routed drinking water through under-sink RO while the city finalizes a permanent upgrade.
